name: Sagar Amruth
tagline: vibemarketer and aura farmer for brands and creators
bio: I produce cool AI content for a living. Been at it for about four years now, working closely with some of India's biggest AI creators.
I'm just genuinely curious about AI. I run experiments, fail, try again, and somewhere in that loop the actual work gets done.
Helped build a fully automated AI news channel producing content at a scale that didn't really exist before. Recognised by Youtube at Davos WEF.
That ended up getting the attention of companies like OpenAI, Intel, NVIDIA, Meta, and Microsoft. Now I run campaigns for them and a bunch of others.

featuredImage.alt: Sagar Amruth with Satya Nadella, CEO of Microsoft
